title: INAF sells assets for IDR312.94 billion to pay for employee rightsizing and debt
body: PT Indofarma announced that it will sell its assets worth around IDR 312.94 billion consisting of land and buildings located in 10 provinces in Indonesia.

title: After Canada, STTP to explore US market
body: PT Siantar Top Tbk (STTP), a snack producer, is exploring the United States (US) market to expand export sales potential in the future.

title: Official, BJTM injects capital to two regional banks
body: PT Bank Pembangunan Daerah (BPD) Jawa Timur Tbk (BJTM) is officially allocating capital of up to IDR 200 billion to Regional Banks (BPD) of Southeast Sulawesi and East Nusa Tenggara.

title: Going private, MASA sets exercise price to IDR 8,400
body: PT Multistrada Arah Sarana Tbk (MASA) has decided to set buyback price to a fantastic price level at IDR 8,400 per share following its go-private plan.

title: Covering BPJS Kesehatan bills, RS Murni Teguh seeks loan
body: PT Murni Sadar Tbk (MTMH), the managing company of Murni Teguh Hospitals, secured a working capital credit worth a total of IDR 50 billion from PT Bank Mandiri (Persero) Tbk (BMRI).

title: INAF sells assets for IDR312.94 billion to pay for employee rightsizing and debt
body: PT Indofarma announced that it will sell its assets worth around IDR 312.94 billion consisting of land and buildings located in 10 provinces in Indonesia.

title: After Canada, STTP to explore US market
body: PT Siantar Top Tbk (STTP), a snack producer, is exploring the United States (US) market to expand export sales potential in the future.

title: Official, BJTM injects capital to two regional banks
body: PT Bank Pembangunan Daerah (BPD) Jawa Timur Tbk (BJTM) is officially allocating capital of up to IDR 200 billion to Regional Banks (BPD) of Southeast Sulawesi and East Nusa Tenggara.

title: Going private, MASA sets exercise price to IDR 8,400
body: PT Multistrada Arah Sarana Tbk (MASA) has decided to set buyback price to a fantastic price level at IDR 8,400 per share following its go-private plan.

title: Covering BPJS Kesehatan bills, RS Murni Teguh seeks loan
body: PT Murni Sadar Tbk (MTMH), the managing company of Murni Teguh Hospitals, secured a working capital credit worth a total of IDR 50 billion from PT Bank Mandiri (Persero) Tbk (BMRI).

title: Foreign transactions decreased; net foreign volume ended at -120 million shares
body: Foreign investors' share purchasing and selling activity on Thursday, December 12, showed a downward trend compared to the previous day, with 3.12 billion shares purchased and 3.24 billion shares sold.

title: BIPI and GOTO swap places in Top Net Foreign
body: Shares of PT Astrindo Nusantara Infrastruktur Tbk (BIPI) reclaimed the top spot in the net foreign category at the close of stock trading on Thursday (12/12).

title: ECII and SMIL taking part, BNBR's liabilities reduced by 19.07%
body: PT Bakrie & Brothers Tbk (BNBR) has successfully reduced its total liabilities by 19.07% following a debt-to-equity conversion valued at IDR 855 billion, as reported on Wednesday (11/12).

title: EMTK raised stakes in SCMA
body: PT Elang Mahkota Teknologi Tbk (EMTK) increased its portion in PT Surya Citra Media Tbk (SCMA) to 61.32% in a transaction taking place yesterday (11/12).

title: DATA targets 10% revenue growth in 2025
body: PT Remala Abadi Tbk (DATA) is aiming for revenue of IDR 412.91 billion in 2025 or a 10% increase from the 2024 revenue forecast of IDR 375.37 billion.

title: Several sectors entered red zone, JCI corrected by 0.74% in first session
body: The Composite Stock Price Index (IHSG) in the first trading session today moved down 0.74% or 55.24 points to 7,409.51, from the opening position of 7,464.75.

title: Slipped at morning session, SRAJ still relatively solid this year
body: Stock performance of PT Sejahteraraya Anugerahjaya Tbk (SRAJ) was corrected this morning (12/12) following its plan to issue bond of USD 125 million.

title: BULL confident of net profit margin increasing at year-end
body: PT Buana Lintas Laut Tbk (BULL) is optimistic about its net profit margin increasing following higher vessel charter tariff applied in the fourth quarter of 2024.

title: Price shrank, foreign investors rake in 92.55 million of EXCL’s shares
body: Seeing the opportunities, foreign investors reportedly acquired millions shares of PT XL Axiata Tbk (EXCL) when its price was at downtrend yesterday (11/12).

title: Disapprove of merger? EXCL and FREN offer buyback
body: PT XL Axiata Tbk (EXCL) and PT Smartfren Telecom Tbk (FREN) give an escape for minority shareholders disapproving of the merger through buyback option.

title: Optimising assets, HITS sold oil tanker for USD 2.97 million
body: PT Humpuss Intermoda Transportasi Tbk (HITS) recently divested a unit of oil tanker owned by one of its subsidiaries.

title: JCI soars to 7,464.75, foreign investors increased spending
body: The Composite Stock Price Index (IHSG) continued its growth in trading on Wednesday (11/12) today, with an increase of 0.15% or 11.47 points to the level of 7,464.75.

title: Over 6 billion shares bought and sold, leaving 315 million shares in net foreign surplus
body: On Wednesday, December 11, around 6.68 billion shares of Indonesian issuers were purchased by foreign investors, while approximately 6.36 billion shares were sold.

title: SRAJ to issue bonds of IDR 1.89 trillion
body: PT Sejahteraraya Anugrahjaya Tbk (SRAJ), the operator of Mayapada Hospital, plans to issue bonds worth USD 125 million, or equal to approximately IDR 1.89 trillion.

title: Hat-trick, GOTO secures top net foreign again
body: PT Goto Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) records its hat-trick after securing first place at net foreign for three consecutive weeks until the end of today’s (11/12) session.

title: Dividend in sight, IPCM indicates a price uptrend
body: PT Jasa Armada Indonesia Tbk (IPCM) climbed IDR 2 higher this afternoon (11/12) following the announcement of interim dividend distribution.

title: Capital adequacy of Bank IBK Indonesia reaches over 40%
body: PT Bank IBK Indonesia Tbk (AGRS) recorded capital adequacy ratio (CAR) of over 40%.

title: BI survey expects inflation increase in January 2025
body: Inflation is projected to grow in January 2025 before declining in April 2025, according to the Retail Sales Survey of Bank Indonesia in November 2024.

title: Morning session caught EXCL and FREN declining
body: Both PT XL Axiata Tbk (EXCL) and PT Smartfren Telecom Tbk (FREN) were seen corrected at the end of morning session today (11/12) following the merger plan.

title: Highly coveted, Bank Panin reportedly pursued by OCBC and CIMB
body: Oversea-Chinese Banking Corporation (OCBC) and CIMB Group Holdings Bhd are joining the competition to be the controlling shareholder of PT Bank Pan Indonesia Tbk (PNBN) or Bank Panin, according to 3 insiders quoted by Reuters.

title: Posting 34% upturn, CINT enters top gainers
body: The price PT Chitose Internasional Tbk (CINT) saw 34% increase as of this afternoon (11/12).

title: EXCL and FREN to merge, introducing XLSmart Telecom Sejahtera
body: Following the merger, PT XL Axiata Tk (EXCL) and PT Smartfren Telecom Tbk (FREN) agreed to use a brand new name, PT XLSmart Telecom Sejahtera Tbk. The merger will officially take effect on March 22, 2025.

title: Proboya Palu reports high gold content, BRMS optimistic about increased production
body: PT Bumi Resources Minerals Tbk (BRMS) has announced mineral reserve reports from the River Reef and Hill Reef mining sites in Proboya, Palu, following drilling activities conducted by AMC Consultants from Australia.

title: IHSG Strengthens for Two Consecutive Days, Foreign Investors Continue Net Buy
body: The Jakarta Composite Index (IHSG) saw continued gains over the past two days, prompting consistent net buying action from foreign investors.

title: DBS and Japanese banks reportedly eyeing Bank Panin acquisition
body: Several prominent Asian banks are reportedly submitting proposals to acquire PT Bank Pan Indonesia Tbk (PNIN), also known as Bank Panin.

title: Foreign buy and sell reached 4 billion shares; net foreign volume closed at 112 million shares
body: On Tuesday, December 10, the foreign buy and sell volumes were both in the range of 4 billion shares, with 4.10 billion shares sold and 4.21 billion shares bought. This made the net foreign volume surplus at 112.56 million shares.

title: GOTO maintains top spot in net foreign transactions
body: PT Goto Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) has maintained its position at the top of net foreign transactions as of the close of trading on Tuesday (10/12).

title: IBK Indonesia confident of scoring IDR 250 billion of profit this year
body: PT Bank IBK Indonesia Tbk (AGRS) posted a 9.75% increase in net profit for Q3-2024 compared to the same period last year, reaching IDR 170.02 billion.

title: Gearing up towards Indonesia Emas 2045, Ministry of Energy plans nickel reserves boost
body: The Ministry of Energy and Mineral Resources (ESDM) is preparing strategies to boost nickel reserves in anticipation of Indonesia Emas 2045.

title: Prospects for Indonesian coffee industry promising, Fore opened 216 outlets in 43 cities
body: The prospects for the coffee industry in Indonesia are considered quite promising, encouraging Fore Coffee to open 216 outlets spread across 43 cities in Indonesia.
